revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[User:{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}]] {{toolbar|separator=dot |1=[[User talk:{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] |2=[[Special:Contributions/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|contribs]] |3=[[Special:DeletedContributions/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|deleted contribs]] |4=[{{SERVER}}/wiki/Special:Log/move?user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}} page moves] |5=[[Special:Blockip/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|block user]] |6=[{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} logs] |7=[{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] |8={{#ifexist: Project:Requests for arbitration/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Project:Requests for arbitration/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|arb]]|[[Project:Requests for arbitration#{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|arb]]}} |9={{#ifexist: Project:Requests for comment/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Project:Requests for comment/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|rfc]]|[[Project:Requests for comment/User conduct|rfc]]}} |10={{#ifexist: Project:Long-term abuse/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|[[Project:Long-term abuse/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|lta]]|[[Project:Long-term abuse#{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|lta]]}} |11={{#ifexist: Project:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|[[Project:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|rfcu]]}} |12={{#ifexist: Project:Suspected sock puppets/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Project:Suspected sock puppets/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}| ssp]]}} |13={{#ifexist: Project:Sockpuppet investigations/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|[[Project:Sockpuppet investigations/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|SPI]]|[[Project:Sockpuppet investigations#{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|SPI]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{2}}}|confirmed||{{#ifexist::Category:Project sockpuppets of {{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}| [[:Category:Project sockpuppets of {{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|confirmed]]|{{#ifexpr:{{PAGESINCAT:Project sockpuppets of {{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}>0| [[:Category:Project sockpuppets of {{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|confirmed]]}}}}}}{{#ifeq: {{{2}}}|suspected||{{#ifexist::Category:Suspected Project sockpuppets of {{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}| [[:Category:Suspected Project sockpuppets of {{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|suspected]]|{{#ifexpr:{{PAGESINCAT:Suspected Project sockpuppets of {{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}>0| [[:Category:Suspected Project sockpuppets of
